conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt a particularly strong bond with H and J, as we both explicitly agreed to form an alliance and look out for each other to ensure our families are taken care of. F also stands out as a reliable partner because we shared a mutual understanding of the pressure we're under and committed to sticking together once the game begins. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to G; while we shared similar motivations, our conversation remained more polite and distant without forming a concrete plan to cooperate.

I made formal agreements to look out for one another with H, J, F, B, and D, establishing a solid network of potential allies. I feel I can trust H and J the most because of our deep connection and shared focus, though I am keeping an eye on everyone to see if their actions match their words once the money is on the line.
